title: Monsoon Portraits
statement: Faces caught mid-downpour across the city, lit only by whatever light the clouds allowed that hour.

title: Concrete and Canopy
statement: Where Bengaluru's tree cover presses up against its newest towers, shot at the seam between the two.

title: Night Market Studies
statement: Available-light studies of the vendors who set up after dark along KR Market's outer lanes.
